grouped_cv.stat_test_family: full seven-model grouped pooled benchmark family

metadata.note: Holm correction in this file is applied within the recurrent-only control family {cfc_vs_gru, gru_vs_lstm, cfc_vs_lstm}. This differs from pooled_stats.csv and sessionwise_stats.csv, where Holm correction is applied within the full benchmark family.

tau_analysis.time_summary_note: The manuscript timing sentence uses subject-level peak/window summaries from tau_time_window_summary.csv. The global_mean_timecourse_summary, when present, is based on class-averaged timecourses and should not be compared directly to the manuscript values.

revision_mamba_pooled.note: Shared-protocol PyTorch MI-Mamba-style surrogate; not a byte-for-byte reproduction.

revision_mamba_hybrid_sessionwise.note: Session-wise revision extension for MI-Mamba-style and spatial-spectral hybrid controls.

revision_loso_riemann_alignment.note: Summary regenerated from existing metrics after fixing paired-test variant column handling. euclidean_alignment uses unlabeled trials from each subject, including held-out subject, as a test-time unsupervised alignment diagnostic.

revision_cfc_dt_tau_ablation.note: This table reflects the completed rows present when export_reproducibility_artifacts.py was run.

revision_tau_topography.note: Values are channel-wise sensitivity of hidden-state tau, not electrode-specific learned tau parameters.
